calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion By Plaintiff Of Prove-Up On Request For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Angie Diner, CSR 9581. Telephone: 415-551-0612.

Robert C. Christensen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Valley Forge Insurance Company.
No Appearance by defaulted defendant Reza Eslaminia
Default waw entered against defendant on August 1, 2017.
The Court granted plaintiff's request to waive witness appearance at prove-up hearing today, November 6, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Valley Forge Insurance, and against the Defaulted Defendant Reza Eslaminia, as follows:

Costs - $450.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $450.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-23-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Christensen, Esq. (510-645-2300) of CNS Covergae Litigation Group for Plaintiff/Moving party VALLEY FORGE INSURANCE COMPANY.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF VALLEY FORGE INSURANCE COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Plaintiff Valley Forge Insurance Company's motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion By Plaintiff Of Prove-Up On Request For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-19-2017 Continued To Nov-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2017 Set For Trial On Jan-22-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
